artPrompt: A steaming foil-covered casserole dish set on a folding table on a sunlit town green, gentle wisps of warmth rising into golden afternoon light, picket fences and blank lawn placards softly blurred behind, a crowd of townsfolk hazing into leafy green and warm ivory, the humble dish glowing as the heart of the gathering, tender and warm, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Casserole for the Cause
text: You gain 1 life for each creature you control. (It's a big casserole. The snack table is the heart of the movement.)
flavorText: Tuna noodle. Always tuna noodle. Marge brings the same dish to every recall and nobody has the heart to ask her to stop.
